sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 코스트코는 2025 회계연도 4분기 매출 844억 달러, 순이익 26억 1,000만 달러를 기록하며 견조한 성장세를 보였습니다.

keyPoints.text: 4분기 순매출은 844억 달러로 전년 동기 대비 8.0% 증가했으며, 연간 순매출은 2,699억 달러로 8.1% 성장했습니다.

businessChanges.text: 현재 전 세계적으로 총 914개의 창고형 매장을 운영 중이며, 미국 및 푸에르토리코 629개, 캐나다 110개, 멕시코 42개 등을 포함합니다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 순매출 844억 달러(전년 동기 782억 달러 대비 8.0% 증가)
연간 순매출 2,699억 달러(전년 2,496억 달러 대비 8.1% 증가)
연간 순이익 80억 9,900만 달러(전년 73억 6,700만 달러 대비 증가)

watchItems.text: 환율 변동 및 휘발유 가격 변화가 향후 매출 및 수익성에 미치는 영향에 대한 경영진의 분석을 확인할 필요가 있습니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 costex9918-k92525.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Press Release COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION REPORTS FOURTH QUARTER AND FISCAL YEAR 2025 OPERATING RESULTS ISSAQUAH, Wash., September 25, 2025 - Costco Wholesale Corporation (“Costco” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: COST) today announced its operating results for the 16-week fourth quarter and the 52-week fiscal year ended August 31, 2025. Net sales for the quarter increased 8.0 percent, to $84.4 billion, from $78.2 billion last year. Net sales for the fiscal year increased 8.1 percent, to $269.9 billion, from $249.6 billion last year. Comparable sales for the fourth quarter and fiscal year were as follows: 16 Weeks 16 Weeks 52 Weeks 52 Weeks Adjusted* Adjusted* U.S. 5.1% 6.0% 6.2% 7.3% Canada  Normalized numeric aliases: $84.4 billion = 844억 달러; $78.2 billion = 782억 달러; $269.9 billion = 2,699억 달러; $249.6 billion = 2,496억 달러; $84.4 = 84.4달러; $78.2 = 78.2달러; $269.9 = 269.9달러; $249.6 = 249.6달러; 8.1 percent = 8.1%; 8.0 percent = 8.0%.

e impacts from changes in gasoline prices and foreign exchange. Net income for the fourth quarter was $2.610 billion, $5.87 per diluted share, compared to $2.354 billion, $5.29 per diluted share, last year. Last year's results included a net non-recurring tax benefit of $63 million, $0.14 per diluted share, related to a transfer pricing settlement, and true-ups of tax reserves. Net income for the fiscal year was $8.099 billion, $18.21 per diluted share, compared to $7.367 billion, $16.56 per diluted share, last year.
